title: Alexs Caves Cruncher Recipes [Species]
description: A Datapack that adds the mob drops from Alexs Caves to the Cruncher from the Species mod.
body:
Adds in Cruncher mob drops for Alex's Caves.

This includes recipes for ALL mobs that have drops, including boss mobs. The recipes are as follows:
- Tremorsaurus: Tremorsaurus Egg
- Grottoceratops: Grottoceratops Egg
- Vallumraptor: Vallumraptor Egg
- Relicheirus: Relicheirus Egg
- Subterranodon: Subterranodon Egg
- Trilocaris: Raw Trilocaris Tail
- Atlatitan: Atlatitan Egg
- Luxtructosaurus: Tectonic Shard
- Underzealot: Dark Tatters
- Vesper: Vesper Wing
- Gloomoth: Moth Dust
- Corrodent: Corrodent Teeth
- Watcher: Occult Gem
- Forsaken: Pure Darkness
- Notor: Notor Gizmo
- Teletor: Telecore
- Magnetron: Not Farmable
- Ferrouslime: Ferrouslimeball
- Boundroid: Heavyweight
- Tripodfish: Tripodfish
- Sea Pig: Sea Pig
- Gossamer Worm: Bioluminesscence
- Lanternfish: Lanternfish
- Hullbreaker: Immortal Embryo
- Deep One: Not Farmable
- Deep One Knight: Not Farmable
- Deep One Mage: Not Farmable
- Mine Guardian: Depth Charge
- Gammaroach: Toxic Paste
- Braniac: Charred Remnant
- Nucleeper: Fissle Core
- Ray Cat: Not Farmable
- Radgill: Radgill
- Tremorzilla: Tremorzilla Egg
- Sweetish Fish: Red Sweetish Fish
- Gummy Bear: Red Gelatin
- Gingerbread Man: Gingerbread Crumbs
- Caramel Cube: Caramel
- Gumbeeper: Gumballs
- Licowitch: Radiant Essence
- Gum Worm: Sweet Tooth
